title: begonia gabaldonensis
intro: Begonia gabaldonensis, also known as Begonia gabaldonensis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Begonia gabaldonensis has been traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are believed to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
